A

AbstractGenerator - Class in generator
Base class for number generators.
AbstractGenerator(int) - Constructor for class generator.AbstractGenerator
Creates a generator with the given list size.
AbstractMenu - Class in view.menu
Abstract base class for all menu screens in the application.
AbstractMenu(String, int, int) - Constructor for class view.menu.AbstractMenu
Creates the menu window with the given title and dimensions.
AbstractSortRunner - Class in controller
Abstract class for running a sorting algorithm in the background.
AbstractSortRunner(List<Integer>, String, VisualizationListener, SortStats) - Constructor for class controller.AbstractSortRunner
Sets up everything needed to run the sort.
AbstractVisualizer - Class in view.window
Abstract base class for all sorting visualizer windows.
AbstractVisualizer(String, int, int, int) - Constructor for class view.window.AbstractVisualizer
Creates the visualizer window with the given title, size, and initial array size.
ACCENT - Static variable in class view.menu.AbstractMenu
 
addListener(Listener) - Static method in class util.SortingListener
Adds a listener to the list of listeners.
algorithm - Variable in class controller.AbstractSortRunner
 
ALGORITHMS - Static variable in class view.menu.AbstractMenu
 
AppConfig - Class in util
Utility class that loads and exposes application configuration from config.txt.
AppConfig() - Constructor for class util.AppConfig
 
aux(List<Integer>, int, int, int) - Static method in class sorting.MergeSorting
Merges two sorted sublists into one sorted list.

B

BarPanel - Class in view.components
This class is used to display sorting data as bars.
BarPanel() - Constructor for class view.components.BarPanel
 
benchmark - package benchmark
 
BenchmarkConfig - Class in benchmark
 
BenchmarkConfig(String, String, int, double, int) - Constructor for class benchmark.BenchmarkConfig
 
BenchmarkRunner - Class in benchmark
 
BenchmarkRunner() - Constructor for class benchmark.BenchmarkRunner
 
BG - Static variable in class view.menu.AbstractMenu
 
BogoSort - Class in sorting
BogoSort is an algorithm which sorts a list by shuffling it randomly until it happens to be sorted.
BogoSort() - Constructor for class sorting.BogoSort
 
BubbleSort - Class in sorting
Goes through the list, compares adjacent elements, and swaps them if they are in the wrong order.
BubbleSort() - Constructor for class sorting.BubbleSort
 
BucketSort - Class in sorting
This algorithm distributes elements into several buckets, sorts each bucket individually, and then merges them back together.
BucketSort() - Constructor for class sorting.BucketSort
 
buildControlPanel() - Method in class view.window.AbstractVisualizer
Builds and returns the control panel with all the buttons, the size, and the speed slider.
buildUI() - Method in class view.menu.CompareMenu
Builds and arranges all the form fields, dropdowns, and buttons for the compare menu.
buildUI() - Method in class view.menu.MainMenu
Builds and arranges the welcome message and the three main action buttons.
buildUI() - Method in interface view.menu.MenuInterface
Builds and arranges all the UI components of the menu.
buildUI() - Method in class view.menu.SingleAlgoMenu
Builds and arranges all the form fields, dropdowns, and buttons for the menu.

C

clearListeners() - Static method in class util.SortingListener
Removes all listeners from the current thread's listener list.
CocktailShakerSort - Class in sorting
Cocktail Shaker Sort is a two-way version of Bubble Sort.
CocktailShakerSort() - Constructor for class sorting.CocktailShakerSort
 
CombSort - Class in sorting
Comb Sort is an improved version of Bubble Sort.
CombSort() - Constructor for class sorting.CombSort
 
CompareController - Class in controller
Controls the side-by-side comparison of two sorting algorithms.
CompareController(CompareWindow, String, String, String, double, int) - Constructor for class controller.CompareController
Creates a new CompareController object.
CompareMenu - Class in view.menu
The menu screen where the user sets up a side-by-side comparison of two sorting algorithms.
CompareMenu() - Constructor for class view.menu.CompareMenu
Creates and displays the compare menu window.
CompareSortRunner - Class in controller
Sort runner used for the side-by-side comparison view.
CompareSortRunner(List<Integer>, String, BarPanel, VisualizationListener, SortStats, CompareController) - Constructor for class controller.CompareSortRunner
Creates a new CompareSortRunner object.
CompareWindow - Class in view.window
A class that has a visualizer window that runs two sorting algorithms side by side for comparison.
CompareWindow(String, String, String, double, int) - Constructor for class view.window.CompareWindow
Creates and displays the comparison window for two sorting algorithms.
controller - package controller

doInBackground() - Method in class controller.AbstractSortRunner
Runs the sort on the background thread.
done() - Method in class controller.CompareSortRunner
Called automatically by SwingWorker when the sort finishes.
done() - Method in class controller.SortRunner
Called automatically by SwingWorker when the sort finishes.

E

EntropyGenerator - Class in generator
Generator that creates a list with a target entropy level based on the proportion of displaced elements.
EntropyGenerator(double, int) - Constructor for class generator.EntropyGenerator
Creates an entropy-based generator.

EntropyGeneratorTest() - Constructor for class test.generator.EntropyGeneratorTest
 
export - package export
 
exportSummary(String, List<SortStats>) - Static method in class export.CsvExporter
 

F

flip(List<Integer>, int) - Static method in class sorting.PancakeSort
Reverses the portion of the list from index 0 up to index k (inclusive).

G

generate() - Method in class generator.AbstractGenerator
Generates a new list according to the subclass strategy.
generate() - Method in class generator.EntropyGenerator
Generates a list starting from sorted order, then applies a cyclic displacement on randomly chosen indices.
generate() - Method in class generator.RandomGenerator
Generates a shuffled list of integers.
generate() - Method in class generator.ReverseEntropyGenerator
Generates a list starting from reverse order, then applies a cyclic displacement on randomly chosen indices.
generate() - Method in class generator.SortedGenerator
 
generate() - Method in class generator.SwapSortGenerator
 
generateData() - Method in class controller.CompareController
Generates a fresh pair of identical lists and updates the view.
generateData() - Method in class controller.VisualizerController
Generates a new list and updates the view with the new data.
generateData() - Method in class view.window.CompareWindow
Tells the controller to generate new data for the algorithms.
generateData() - Method in interface view.window.VisualizerInterface
Generates a new set of data to be sorted and displays it on the visualizer.
generateData() - Method in class view.window.VisualizerWindow
Tells the controller to generate a new set of data.
generator - package generator
 
GENERATORS - Static variable in class view.menu.AbstractMenu
 
get(String) - Static method in class sorting.SortingAlgorithmFactory
Returns the sorting algorithm matching the given name.
getAccesses() - Method in class model.SortStats
 
getAlgorithm() - Static method in class util.AppConfig
Returns the name of the first (or only) sorting algorithm to pre-select in the menu.
getAlgorithm2() - Static method in class util.AppConfig
Returns the name of the second sorting algorithm to pre-select in the compare menu.
getAlgorithmName() - Method in class benchmark.BenchmarkConfig
 
getAlgorithmName() - Method in class model.SortStats
 
getAnimationSpeed() - Static method in class util.AppConfig
Returns the initial animation speed for the visualizer.
getArraySize() - Static method in class util.AppConfig
Returns the initial size of the array to sort.
getBarPanel1() - Method in class view.window.CompareWindow
Returns the bar panel for the first algorithm.
getBarPanel2() - Method in class view.window.CompareWindow
Returns the bar panel for the second algorithm.
getComparisons() - Method in class model.SortStats
 
getComparisonTimes() - Method in class model.SortStats
Returns the list of timestamps (in ms) at which each comparison happened.
getComparisonValues() - Method in class model.SortStats
Returns the running total of comparisons at each recorded point in time.
getElapsedMs() - Method in class model.SortStats
Returns how long the sort took in milliseconds.
getEntropy() - Method in class benchmark.BenchmarkConfig
 
getEntropy() - Method in class model.SortStats
 
getEntropy() - Static method in class util.AppConfig
Returns the entropy value used when the generator is set to "Entropy" or "Reverse Entropy".
getGenerator() - Static method in class util.AppConfig
Returns the data generator type to pre-select in the menu.
getGeneratorLabel() - Method in class model.SortStats
 
getGeneratorType() - Method in class benchmark.BenchmarkConfig
 
getGeneratorType() - Method in class model.SortStats
 
getLastDisplaced() - Method in class generator.EntropyGenerator
Returns how many elements were displaced in the last generated list.
getLastDisplaced() - Method in class generator.ReverseEntropyGenerator
Returns how many elements were displaced in the last generated list.
getLastEntropy() - Method in class generator.EntropyGenerator
Returns the actual entropy of the last generated list.
getLastEntropy() - Method in class generator.ReverseEntropyGenerator
Returns the actual entropy of the last generated list.
getList() - Method in class generator.AbstractGenerator
Returns the generated list.
getList() - Method in interface generator.NumberGenerator
Returns the generated list.
getPreferredSize() - Method in class view.components.BarPanel
Returns the preferred size of the panel.
getRepetitions() - Method in class benchmark.BenchmarkConfig
 
getRun() - Method in class model.SortStats
 
getSize() - Method in class benchmark.BenchmarkConfig
 
getSize() - Method in class generator.AbstractGenerator
Returns the size configured for this generator.
getSize() - Method in interface generator.NumberGenerator
Returns the size of the generated list.
getSize() - Method in class model.SortStats
 
getSpeedSlider() - Method in class view.window.AbstractVisualizer
Returns the speed slider so subclasses can read its value during sorting.
getStats() - Method in class controller.VisualizerController
 
getStats1() - Method in class controller.CompareController
 
getStats2() - Method in class controller.CompareController
 
getSwaps() - Method in class generator.SwapSortGenerator

getSwapTimes() - Method in class model.SortStats

getSwapValues() - Method in class model.SortStats

H

highlight(int, int) - Method in class view.components.BarPanel
Sets which two bars should be colored, then repaints the panel.
highlightBars(int, int) - Method in class controller.VisualizerController
Highlights two bars in the view during the sort animation.
highlightBars(int, int) - Method in class view.window.VisualizerWindow
Highlights two bars on the bar panel without changing the data.

I

incrementAccesses() - Method in class model.SortStats
Call this every time the algorithm reads or writes to the array.
incrementComparisons() - Method in class model.SortStats
Call this every time the algorithm does a comparison.
incrementSwaps() - Method in class model.SortStats
Call this every time the algorithm does a swap.
init() - Method in class generator.AbstractGenerator
Initializes the generator by calling generate() and storing the result.
initialSize - Variable in class view.window.AbstractVisualizer

This interface is for listening to events during the sorting process.

Creates a secondary navigation button with the default look.
makeTitle(String) - Method in class view.menu.AbstractMenu
Creates a bold centered title label with the standard white color.
maxIndex(List<Integer>, int) - Static method in class sorting.PancakeSort
Finds the index of the largest element in the list from index 0 up to k (exclusive).

Defines the basic actions that every menu screen must implement.

Recursively divides the list into sublists and merges them.

N

notifyAccess(int, int) - Static method in class util.SortingListener
Notifies all listeners when a single element is accessed (get or set).
notifyComparison(int, int, int, int) - Static method in class util.SortingListener
Notifies all listeners when two elements are compared.
notifySwap(int, int, int, int) - Static method in class util.SortingListener
Notifies all listeners when two elements are swapped.
NumberGenerator - Interface in generator
Common interface for all number generators.

O

onAccess(int, int) - Method in class controller.VisualizationListener
Called when a single element is accessed.
onAccess(int, int) - Method in interface util.Listener
Called when a single element is accessed (get or set).
onAccess(int, int) - Method in class util.StatsListener
Called when an element is accessed (get or set) during sorting.
onBothSortsDone(List<Integer>, List<Integer>, SortStats, SortStats) - Method in class view.window.CompareWindow
Called when both sorting algorithms have finished.
onComparison(int, int, int, int) - Method in class controller.VisualizationListener
Called when two elements are compared.
onComparison(int, int, int, int) - Method in interface util.Listener
Called when two elements are compared.
onComparison(int, int, int, int) - Method in class util.StatsListener
Called when two elements are compared during sorting.
onOneSortDone() - Method in class controller.CompareController
Called by each sort runner when it finishes.
onPaused() - Method in class view.window.AbstractVisualizer
Updates the control panel state when sorting is paused.
onReset() - Method in class view.window.AbstractVisualizer
Updates the control panel state when sorting is reset.
onResumed() - Method in class view.window.AbstractVisualizer
Updates the control panel state when sorting is resumed.
onSizeChanged(int) - Method in class view.window.AbstractVisualizer
Called when the user changes the array size.
onSizeChanged(int) - Method in class view.window.CompareWindow
Tells the controller to update the array size when the user changes it.
onSizeChanged(int) - Method in class view.window.VisualizerWindow
Tells the controller to update the array size when the user changes it.
onSortingDone() - Method in class controller.VisualizerController
Called by SortRunner when the sort finishes.
onSortingDone(List<Integer>, SortStats) - Method in class view.window.VisualizerWindow
Called when sorting finishes.
onSortingStarted() - Method in class view.window.AbstractVisualizer
Updates the control panel state when sorting starts.
onSwap(int, int, int, int) - Method in class controller.VisualizationListener
Called when two elements are swapped.
onSwap(int, int, int, int) - Method in interface util.Listener
Called when two elements are swapped.
onSwap(int, int, int, int) - Method in class util.StatsListener
Called when two elements are swapped during sorting.
open() - Method in class view.menu.CompareMenu
Validates the form inputs and opens the comparison window if everything is valid.
open() - Method in class view.menu.MainMenu
Makes the main menu window visible.
open() - Method in interface view.menu.MenuInterface
Makes the menu visible to the user.
open() - Method in class view.menu.SingleAlgoMenu
Validates the form inputs and opens the visualizer window if everything is valid.
openStatsWindow() - Method in class view.window.AbstractVisualizer
Opens the statistics window for the current sorting session.
openStatsWindow() - Method in class view.window.CompareWindow
Opens the stats window showing the results of both algorithms side by side.
openStatsWindow() - Method in class view.window.VisualizerWindow
Opens the stats window showing the results of the last sorting run.

P

paintComponent(Graphics) - Method in class view.components.BarPanel
Draws all the bars on the panel.
paintComponent(Graphics) - Method in class view.components.RealtimeGraphPanel
Draws the full graph including the grid, axes, labels, data lines, and legend.
paintComponent(Graphics) - Method in class view.components.StatsBarGraphPanel
Draws the horizontal bars, algorithm names, metric title, and value labels.
PancakeSort - Class in sorting
Pancake Sort sorts a list using only "flips", which means reversing a prefix of the list up to some index.
PancakeSort() - Constructor for class sorting.PancakeSort
 
PANEL_BG - Static variable in class view.menu.AbstractMenu
 
parseEntropy(String) - Method in class view.menu.AbstractMenu
Parses and validates an entropy value from a text input.
pause() - Method in class controller.CompareController
Pauses both sorts if they are currently running.
pause() - Method in class controller.VisualizationListener
Pauses the animation.
pause() - Method in class controller.VisualizerController
Pauses the sort if it's currently running.
pauseBtn - Variable in class view.window.AbstractVisualizer
 

Q

QuickSort - Class in sorting
QuickSort works by picking a pivot element and rearranging the list so everything smaller than the pivot is on the left and everything bigger is on the right.
QuickSort() - Constructor for class sorting.QuickSort
 

R

RandomGenerator - Class in generator
Generator that creates a randomly shuffled list of integers from 0 to size - 1.
RandomGenerator(int) - Constructor for class generator.RandomGenerator
Creates a random generator for the given size.
RandomGeneratorTest - Class in test.generator
 
RandomGeneratorTest() - Constructor for class test.generator.RandomGeneratorTest
 
RealtimeGraphPanel - Class in view.components
A class that has a panel that draws a real-time line graph of sorting statistics over time.
RealtimeGraphPanel(String, SortStats...) - Constructor for class view.components.RealtimeGraphPanel
Creates the graph panel for the given metric and stats objects.
reset() - Method in class controller.CompareController
Cancels any running sorts, resets all state, and generates fresh data.
reset() - Method in class controller.VisualizerController
Cancels any running sort, resets all state, and generates new data.
reset() - Method in class view.components.LiveStatsPanel
Stops the timer and resets all labels back to their default state.
reset() - Method in class view.window.CompareWindow
Resets both live stats panels and tells the controller to reset the sorting state.
reset() - Method in interface view.window.VisualizerInterface
Stops the sorting and resets the visualizer back to its initial state.
reset() - Method in class view.window.VisualizerWindow
Resets the live stats panel and tells the controller to reset the sorting state.
resetBtn - Variable in class view.window.AbstractVisualizer
 
resume() - Method in class controller.VisualizationListener
Resumes the animation after a pause.
ReverseEntropyGenerator - Class in generator
Generator that starts from a reverse-sorted list and applies entropy-controlled displacement.
ReverseEntropyGenerator(double, int) - Constructor for class generator.ReverseEntropyGenerator
Creates a reverse-entropy generator.

S

setArraySize(int) - Method in class controller.CompareController
Updates the array size and regenerates data if no sort is running.
setArraySize(int) - Method in class controller.VisualizerController
Updates the array size and regenerates data if no sort is running.
setLiveData(List<Integer>) - Method in class view.components.BarPanel
Sets the data list directly.
setLiveData(List<Integer>) - Method in class view.window.VisualizerWindow
Sets the live data reference on the bar panel.
shannon(double) - Method in class generator.EntropyGenerator
Computes the binary Shannon entropy for a proportion p.
shannon(double) - Method in class generator.ReverseEntropyGenerator
Computes the binary Shannon entropy for a proportion p.
shuffle(List<Integer>) - Static method in class sorting.BogoSort
Randomly shuffles the list using Java's built-in Collections.shuffle.
SingleAlgoMenu - Class in view.menu
This class shows a menu screen where the user sets up a single algorithm visualization.
SingleAlgoMenu() - Constructor for class view.menu.SingleAlgoMenu
Creates and displays the single algorithm menu window.
size - Variable in class generator.AbstractGenerator
 
sort(List<Integer>) - Static method in class sorting.BogoSort
Sorts the list by repeatedly shuffling it until it's in order.
sort(List<Integer>) - Static method in class sorting.BubbleSort
Sorts the provided list using the Bubble Sort technique.
sort(List<Integer>) - Static method in class sorting.BucketSort
Sort method that executes the Bucket Sort logic.
sort(List<Integer>) - Static method in class sorting.CocktailShakerSort
Sorts the list by doing alternating left-to-right and right-to-left passes.
sort(List<Integer>) - Static method in class sorting.CombSort
Sorts the list by comparing elements separated by a gap that shrinks each pass.
sort(List<Integer>) - Static method in class sorting.InsertionSorting
Sorts the given list using the Insertion Sort algorithm.
sort(List<Integer>) - Static method in class sorting.MergeSorting
Sorts the list using the Merge Sort algorithm.
sort(List<Integer>) - Static method in class sorting.PancakeSort
Sorts the list using pancake flips.
sort(List<Integer>) - Static method in class sorting.QuickSort
Entry point for the sort.
sort(List<Integer>) - Method in interface sorting.SortingAlgorithm
Sorts the given list of integers in ascending order.
sorted(List<Integer>) - Static method in class sorting.BogoSort
Checks whether the list is already sorted in ascending order.

SortingAlgorithm - Interface in sorting

SortRunner - Class in controller
Sort runner used for the single algorithm visualizer.

SortStats - Class in model
Keeps track of stats for a sorting algorithm while it runs.

Creates a SortStats with just an algorithm name and input label.

speedSlider - Variable in class view.window.AbstractVisualizer
 
start() - Method in class controller.CompareController
Starts the sort, or resumes it if it was paused.
start() - Method in class controller.VisualizerController
Starts the sort, or resumes it if it was paused.
start() - Method in class model.SortStats
Resets everything and starts the timer.
start(SortStats) - Method in class view.components.LiveStatsPanel
Starts the live update timer with the given stats object to track.
startBtn - Variable in class view.window.AbstractVisualizer
 
startLiveStats(SortStats) - Method in class view.window.VisualizerWindow
Starts the live stats display using the given stats object.
startLiveStats(SortStats, SortStats) - Method in class view.window.CompareWindow
Starts the live stats display for the algorithms at the same time.
startSorting() - Method in class view.window.CompareWindow
Tells the controller to start sorting the algorithms.
startSorting() - Method in interface view.window.VisualizerInterface
Starts the sorting algorithm on the current data.
startSorting() - Method in class view.window.VisualizerWindow
Tells the controller to start the sorting algorithm.
stats - Variable in class controller.AbstractSortRunner
 
StatsBarGraphPanel - Class in view.components
A class that represents a panel that draws a horizontal bar graph comparing one metric across sorting algorithms.
StatsBarGraphPanel(String, SortStats...) - Constructor for class view.components.StatsBarGraphPanel
Creates the bar graph panel for the given metric and stats objects.
statsBtn - Variable in class view.window.AbstractVisualizer
 
statsListener - Variable in class controller.AbstractSortRunner
Listener that records stats as the sort runs.
StatsListener - Class in util
A listener that tracks sorting statistics like comparisons, swaps, and accesses.
StatsListener(SortStats) - Constructor for class util.StatsListener
Creates a StatsListener that will record events into the given stats object.
StatsWindow - Class in view.components
A class that shows the performance statistics of one or two sorting algorithms.
StatsWindow(SortStats...) - Constructor for class view.components.StatsWindow
Creates and displays the statistics window for the given objects.
stop() - Method in class model.SortStats
Stops the timer.
stop() - Method in class view.components.LiveStatsPanel
Stops the timer and does one final refresh to show the most recent values.
stopTimer() - Method in class view.components.RealtimeGraphPanel
Stops the repaint timer.
swaps - Variable in class generator.SwapSortGenerator

Tells the controller to pause or resume the algorithms.

Pauses the sorting if it is running, or resumes it if it is already paused.
togglePause() - Method in class view.window.VisualizerWindow
Tells the controller to pause or resume sorting.

U

update(List<Integer>, int, int) - Method in class view.components.BarPanel
Updates the data and repaints the panel.
updateBars(List<Integer>, int, int) - Method in class view.window.VisualizerWindow
Updates the bar panel with new data and highlights two bars being compared or swapped.
updateBars(List<Integer>, List<Integer>) - Method in class view.window.CompareWindow
Updates both bar panels with new data.
util - package util
 

V

view.components - package view.components
 
view.menu - package view.menu
 
view.window - package view.window
 
visListener - Variable in class controller.AbstractSortRunner
Listener that updates the visualization as the sort runs.
VisualizationListener - Class in controller
Class that listens to sorting events and updates the visualization in real time.
VisualizationListener(BarPanel, JSlider) - Constructor for class controller.VisualizationListener
Constructor for compare mode, it uses just a BarPanel instead of the window.
VisualizationListener(VisualizerWindow, JSlider) - Constructor for class controller.VisualizationListener
Constructor for single algorithm mode, it uses VisualizerWindow.
VisualizerController - Class in controller
Class that controls the single algorithm visualizer.
VisualizerController(VisualizerWindow, String, String, double, int) - Constructor for class controller.VisualizerController
Creates a new VisualizerController object.
VisualizerInterface - Interface in view.window
Defines the basic actions that every sorting visualizer must support.
VisualizerWindow - Class in view.window
This class shows the main visualizer window for a single sorting algorithm.
VisualizerWindow(String, String, double, int) - Constructor for class view.window.VisualizerWindow
Creates and displays the visualizer window for the given algorithm and data settings.

W

wireEntropyVisibility(JComboBox<String>, JLabel, JTextField) - Method in class view.menu.AbstractMenu
Sets the entropy label and text field visibility to the selected generator type.
